name: Medal of Honor™: Above and Beyond

reviews.review_description: The one reason I don’t really play this game cause the gore it should every time when you shoot them. It should have a blood wound in blood would be pouring everywhere. And please every time when you get the shotgun and you shoot someone’s arm off, please make it super gory, and please, with the explosions, make them kinda realistic and kinda add blood onto it

reviews.review_title: A great game that's treated unfairly
reviews.review_description: I'm genuinely baffled by the rating for this game. How can it score lower than the likes of Call of Courage, which is objectively a lesser game? It probably doesn't help that other reviews (like the one complaining about how it's more cutscene than gameplay) are completely inaccurate (you will definitely spend the vast majority of your time in gameplay.) I've played a lot of VR games and this is definitely one of my favourites. The gameplay is excellent (others have complained about the reloading; I personally found this was only an issue when I was in a rush to reload and messed it up) and there is such an amazing variety in the levels. The set pieces are crazily good, especially to see in VR, and I often return to experience them again. In short, people only really put this down because they don't like EA, which is no reason to not buy and enjoy a genuinely great game.

If you are new to VR and want to "experence ww2 scenarios" then this is the game for you but it still has it's flaws. Some minor bugs here and there and lack "effort". The game is basically 3min cutscene, 2min playtime, 4min cutscene, 1min playtime, 5min cutscene, 4min playtime etc... Had to shutoff the metaquest 3s couple of times because of a "standstill/crash". In my opinion the rating in 3/5 for the new players and 2/5 for the more experienced players. Shame because if they had put littlebit more effort in this it could be much better.

The game is one of the most realistic WW2 games and as a WW2 nerd this is good but it is a little bit corny sometimes the gun handling is mostly accurate but this game is the bomb so worth the money  ￼

This game is sooo much fun. It's better to stand up to play this game so you can turn quickly, and squat, and even get into the prone position. I quickly got used to reloading and cocking the weapons etc. Then I was away with this game and have been totally blown away.
It's huge fun and I recommend to anyone who has enjoyed the MoH series..
Really fun and great game worth getting but the only downside is how much storage space it takes up is the most I have ever seen

this game have really good game play with great difficulty and very cartoonish people also have really physic and the only problem is that they have no  height calibration ￼￼￼so for some short people Characters might be a bit big but other then that this is a good warfare game 

Worth the 40$

- Jayden9wi
So fire my vr is on fire

I am experiencing a progress-blocking bug in Medal of Honor: Above and Beyond on Meta Quest.
During the aircraft / flying mission, the game does not allow me to complete the level. The mission does not progress correctly and the required triggers do not activate, making it impossible to continue the campaign.
I have already:
restarted the mission
replayed the previous mission
fully reinstalled the game
updated the Meta Quest system software
Despite all this, the issue always happens in the same place, which indicates a broken mission script or level bug, not a user error.
This bug completely blocks campaign progress and makes the game impossible to
Favorite is D-Day
Just play it

reviews.review_title: I think its a very good game🔥
reviews.review_description: I honestly think it is very good, yea, the graphics could be better. There is some plainess to it, but I find it really enjoyable. For a game that can run on a stand-alone quest, it's really good shooting physics gun noises gun physics. I think it is well made. And the people that complain about the story mode i think its very enjoyable, the talking the things that happen, the different characters that have different personalities, yea some of the faces are bit plain in expression, but all out I think it's a really fun game i have really enjoyed it. The only thing is, is the absolute Chung of a game 44 gb, saints, and sinners game? It would seem like a bigger game, but it's quite a bit smaller. That's the only complaint I have. But I always enjoy the game.

It’s amazing!I had so much fun.There was a button that said multiplayer.I pressed on it and it told me log in failed.Turns out they got rid of multiplayer!!!Please bring it back.Everyone will then love it more!!!

reviews.review_title: Best and funniest vr game i have bought!

reviews.review_description: Honestly the story was a bit outlandish but it's not the worst. Some of the mission's are actually quite fun, i'm upset but not surprised that the multiplayer was shut down i would've liked to play it more than i did. The graphics honestly weren't as bad but they're definitely underwhelming, but i get having to dumb them down for standalone. Another thing i have a problem with is the fact this game is 40gb of storage (i'm not blaming the developers, but more so Meta for the 128gb of storage that just isn't enough), again i get why but the undeniable fact im going to have to delete multiple game's just to play through this once or twice is not ideal. i do like the game, the gameplay is fun but i don't see myself touching the game again after that. It's not bad but some controls need an update and a graphics update for the 3/3s would be cool to see but i'm not hopeful for those. So if you really don't care about any of the issues, then i would get this if it is ever on sale.
The greatest not only WW2 game but game ever on quest please make more games like this.
Fun game with very good graphics but my controller lags very easily if I could refund I definitely would

I know the story is a little corny but it’s an amazing game that’s really immersive. I like the guns and graphics not to bad. I do think there should be more missions. I hope there’s another vr Medal of Honor coming out

I was really looking forward to this game...

I am a huge medal of honor fan and have been since the 1990s when the first one came out on the playstation. I had heard mixed reviews about this game, including the boring cut scenes and uninspired gameplay, and unfortunately it turns out all of that is correct...

This feels more like a hand holding theme park attraction than a true medal of honor first person shooter.

-the character models are a bit cartoony / fortnitey
-significant graphical glitches especially the water if you have anti aliasing turned on 
-weapon interactions are primitive for vr
-and the levels are bite sized miniature diaramas strung together with boring visuals, invisible walls, and forced on rails story beats told with terrible acting and cringy voice lines from the characters.

this game is simply not good... i would avoid at all costs even after a sale for a seasoned vr gamer. this may serve as a good introduction to vr if you're going to show your dad what vr is

reviews.review_title: Disappointing for a full priced game
reviews.review_description:
Decent hit detection.
Ok enemy AI.
Different vehicles and situations to mix up gameplay types.
Poor graphics, enemies clip through walls and a bad glitch in the sub pen.
Swimming is frustrating.
Too many boring cut scenes.
If this was a game made by an indie studio and sold at a much lower price I wouldn't have as many complaints.

This game is ok. The resolution is low and the graphics suffer a bit from jagged edges, but enabling anti-aliasing in the options helps a lot (it causes artifacts with water effects, but that's preferable to the jagged edges of the game which are very distracting). The gunplay is not as good as from other games such as Into the Radius, Arizona Sunshine 2, and RE4, but it is also not terrible, and some guns are fun to use. There is a good variety of guns, the presentation is good, the environments looks ok, and there are different mechanics across the game to change things a bit (like driving motorcicle, driving a tank, being a gunner in an aircraft, etc). There is a lot of cinematic with NPCs talking which is a hassle considering the story is very boring, but fortunately most cinematics can be skipped. In my opinion this game is too expensive for what it delivers, but it's worth getting it on a sale.
The only fun mission that were fun to me were the b-17 missions and the Omaha landings. Seriously these were the only good missions by far without the enemy being biased a little bit.

Ok. First of all, I love this game. The campaign is great, it’s fun, but the only drawbacks is the graphics on quest are TERRIBLE. The steam version graphics are a billion times better. And also, the storage you need to get the steam version is ABSURD. I do not want to buy a 40 dollar game just to realize I have to delete EVERY single game I have to free up 170 GB. (only for the steam version) I’m only rating it 3 stars because of the graphics and the storage needed. Everything else is great though.

Ive had this game for a while and decided to commit time to it. I was very much drawn in from the start. You get some commentary before each mission and each mission is divided into smaller missions. It gives you a sense of actually being in the situation. There is a good variety that will keep you on your toes. I absolutely enjoyed this game. I think anyone that gives this game a chance will feel the same way. It doesnt have the best VR graphics but it's still very good. There have also been a couple of times in which I  couldn't load my gun in a pressure situation but it didn't happen much. Try this game for sure but make sure you have storage on your headset because it does take a lot of memory.

reviews.review_title: In the running for my favorites list
reviews.review_description: Somehow in the discussion of best games, this one always seems to go unnoticed, perhaps because it was released a while ago, but it definitely has a place amongst my favorites.  This has one of the best narrative driven campaigns to date. From the memorable companions, excellent voice acting and cutscenes to the top tier action  - it feels like you're on a real adventure, doing your part for the war effort. And what an adventure it is!  The missions and locales here are super diverse and fun from staple gunplay missions to unique vehicle sections with planes, tanks, even submarines. Loved the mission variety, and loved the combat. Not all good news though... graphics are admittedly dated, at times feeling akin to a Quest 1 game. Textures are often very low and a couple missions, like the sub level, felt a bit buggy.  Even so, each scene still does a great job at selling the overall atmosphere of combat and the experience. To end on a high note, thank you for providing the veteran commentary serving as inspiration for the missions at the end. It was heartfelt and very touching.

It's really good the graphics don't really matter i got the game 4 or 5 months ago and it was good I have to clear so much space to download it though I wanted to play multi-player but it left it's amazing i recommend it highly when I play it hard but that's awesome I have beaten the game twice and I am playing it again the price of 40 dollars is pricey so buy if it is on sale. It is not a game that will lag or crash, but it has some bugs
Can’t even call this a “game!”  It is a well written,  story driven adventure with characters I fell in love with.  Bravo to the developers with hopes to see a sequel coming in the future.

reviews.review_title: Saw game from youtube and its FIRE
reviews.review_description: Yipppeeeeeee

I always wanted to play this game but I only had a quest 1 but when I got a quest 3 I immediately bought this game. I had a blast playing this game and it felt like cod WW2 It's a fun VR WW2 game and you honestly don't see much of this. Though the graphics were a little lacking I feel like this game was optimized for the quest 1 but was never put on it. Also there were times where the collision on walls were a little off and the enemies were shooting me when I couldn't see them, but this was only apparent on the sub level but besides that it's a good game.

reviews.review_title: I wish there was a PSVR2 remake
reviews.review_description: I liked the story, i rarely see any ww2 shooters with a storymode on vr but this would kinda need a psvr2 remake, enhanced graphics, fixed bugs (yes, there are a few bugs here), the feature of puting the magazine in the gun manualy like arizona sunshine remake not just put it into a square till it turns blue and also the sniper, i dont like the fact that it just puts a photo of a circle and a + in the middle where you look at people and shoot them, i need the scope to be like in sniper elite vr you use the sniper scope like in real life not just look at the scope at it give you a movable image. Overall the game was good, the germans fell realisticaly when they got shot and Rest In Peace Ollie, you died too soon

reviews.review_title: The best Medal of Honor yet!!!!!
reviews.review_description: If I could give 7 stars I would. I've played every Medal of Honor game in the franchise and this is best 1 yet. Its got everything. Driving tanks, gunner on planes, and storming the beaches on D-Day. Wow. A must have for everyone
This game is pretty cool. I was looking for C.O.D. but this game has proven to be pretty cool. Thank you

Forget the graphics. The gameplay and interactions alone feel like they were made by people who have never played a VR game in their lives. It's hard to believe this is a 2020 VR game, when there were already great examples of how to do this right, and even more so that it was made by a big company.
Trash graphics, trash gameplay, trash pacing.
Definitely do not recommend it.

On medal of honour it’s very good!!!On a d-day mission it is quite hard bc of the machine guns and I think this game is worth the money. The graphics are fantastic but still really good. Multiplayer don’t work hope it gets an update so it works
Amazing story, great characters, plentiful of weapons, worth every dollar

reviews.review_title: Probably the best ww2 shooter game
reviews.review_description: It's great it's just sad that you can't play multi-player I hope they add it back this game is still tricky hard and fun try it.

When I got the game the Campaign was really fun and once I finished it I went to multiplayer and I loaded up my first match. It was fun until some player said that they are getting rid of multiplayer. This made me really upset and I thought of this game as a waste. But I didn’t refund it because of how fun the campaign in. Some levels are really fun to replay, especially the D-Day level. Plz fix and bring back Multiplayer.

PS: why did multiplayer got removed from the game. Was it to many bugs.
Thou roughly enjoyed this game and in my opinion one of the best on vr.
